mapper.select: SELECT p.post_id AS postId, 'CONTENT' AS type, p.title, p.content, p.image_url AS imageUrl, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.created_at AS createdDate, m.nickname, m.my_team_code AS category FROM locker_posts p JOIN members m ON p.member_id = m.member_id WHERE p.post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO locker_posts (member_id, category, title, content, image_url, created_at, updated_at, status, view_count) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, #{imageUrl}, NOW(), NOW(), 'ACTIVE', 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE locker_posts SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_id AS commentId, c.content_id AS contentId, c.content, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.member_id AS memberId, m.nickname, m.my_team_code AS memberTeamCode, m.profile_image AS profileImage FROM content_comments c JOIN members m ON c.member_id = m.member_id WHERE c.content_id = #{contentId} AND c.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO content_comments (content_id, member_id, content, created_at) VALUES (#{contentId}, #{memberId}, #{content}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE content_comments SET del_yn = 'Y' WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT reaction_type FROM content_reactions WHERE content_id = #{contentId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO content_reactions (content_id, member_id, reaction_type, created_at) VALUES (#{contentId}, #{memberId}, #{reactionType}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE content_reactions SET reaction_type = #{reactionType} WHERE content_id = #{contentId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM content_reactions WHERE content_id = #{contentId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
